prompt_text:
### Demographics: 58-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 82.7 kg; Height 181.9 cm; BMI 25.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 146/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 7.9%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 6.9%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 235mg/dL; 9 months ago 188mg/dL; 6 months ago 174mg/dL; 3 months ago 162mg/dL; current 135mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.7kg; 9 months ago 77.7kg; 6 months ago 81.1kg; 3 months ago 79.9kg; current 82.7kg), Height (12 months ago 181.9cm; 9 months ago 181.9cm; 6 months ago 181.9cm; 3 months ago 181.9cm; current 181.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 143mmHg; 9 months ago 141mmHg; 6 months ago 143mmHg; 3 months ago 144mmHg; current 146mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 18U/L), AST (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 23U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 22U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; current 55mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 298mg/g; 9 months ago 275mg/g; 6 months ago 342mg/g; 3 months ago 308mg/g; current 239mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 146mg/dL; 9 months ago 165mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 162mg/dL; current 153mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.8g/dL; 9 months ago 11.7g/dL; 6 months ago 12.3g/dL; 3 months ago 12.4g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
